tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.text:
TAP вҖ” enlarge.
DRAG HandвҶ’Field вҖ” play.
DRAG FieldвҶ’Hand вҖ” take back.
Play Settings for more.

settings.title: Settings
settings.text: Drag to Field to open setting cards in your Hand.

fullscreen.title: Fullscreen
fullscreen.text: Drag to Field вҖ” enter fullscreen.

exit_fullscreen.title: Exit Fullscreen
exit_fullscreen.text: Drag to Field вҖ” leave fullscreen.

language_settings.title: Language Settings
language_settings.text: Drag to Field вҖ” get language cards in Hand.

lang_en.title: English
lang_en.text: Drag to Field вҖ” UI and cards in English.

highlight_on.title: Highlight On
highlight_on.text: Drag to Field вҖ” show play hints on key cards.

highlight_off.title: Highlight Off
highlight_off.text: Drag to Field вҖ” hide play hints.

world_controller.title: World Controller
world_controller.text: Drag to Field to bootstrap the world.

starter_deck.title: Programming Starter
starter_deck.text: Programming cards. Drag to Field to play.

guide_weave_1.title: Weave 1
guide_weave_1.text: You are the first Binder. Drag World Controller to the Field.

guide_weave_2.title: Weave 2
guide_weave_2.text: After bootstrap, drag Door to Field to play it.

guide_weave_3.title: Weave 3
guide_weave_3.text: Use programming cards from Hand вҖ” drag each to Field.

guide_weave_4.title: Weave 4
guide_weave_4.text: Tap any card to read it large. Take cards FieldвҶ’Hand anytime.

guide_weave_5.title: Weave 5
guide_weave_5.text: Open Settings for fullscreen, language, and highlights.
